description.plain: 【So Slim, So Comfortable】Only 0.33", this MagSafe portable charger is the slimmest in the market. So slim that you might even forget it when attached to your phone, especially for small phones. So thin, you feel comfortable to hold and won't cutting hand like other heavy ones. Weight only 0.21lb, so lightweight, you can just slide into your tight pocket without sightly bulges, and enjoy charges anywhere you need. Certification: FCC/CE/CCC, Model: F20. 【Ice-Cool & Protection】Drop 50℉ than others!! Equipped with an industrial-leading temperature control system, this MagSafe battery pack won't overheat like others. Always close to body temperature, you won't feel uncomfortable even you holding it to charge after a long time in the hot summer. Effectively protect your device battery and this power bank for long-term use. 【Snap & Go, Firmly Attached】 Wireless charging immediately after contact, no more hassled cables!! Up to 12N magnetic power, 4x stronger than others, this magnetic power bank will attach to your phone firmly, and never move even with heavy shaking in your pocket ( Tested to withstand 3000+ times shaking still with continuous wireless charging). 【Double Up Charging Speed】This wireless portable charger supports a total 18W USB C output and 10W wireless charging. 2 devices can be charged simultaneously. Your phone gets 60% charged in 1H, 2x faster than the official one. Built into the original battery with the phone, our 5000mAh has higher energy conversion and reduces 40% power waste than other 5000mAh. The iPhone 15 pro gets 1 times charge, enough for heavy phone users! 【Durable Alloy-Made】Coated with robust aluminum, this thin portable iPhone charger is anti-fingerprint and scratch-resistant, easy to clean, and durable for long-term use. 【For Both iPhone & Android Phone】This portable charger support iphone 12/13/14/15/16 series, and mag-safe case. It comes with a magnetic ring, and you can attach it to other wireless-enabled devices, like Samsung, Galaxy, Google Pixel, and other Android phones for magnetic charging. !!! 【How To Use the Magnetic Ring】For Qi enable android phones, that do not support magnetic suction, this magnetic ring will solve it. Please tear off the paper, and stick the metal ring to the outer side of your phone case. Size of 5000 mAh: 104 x 66 x 7.8 mm / 4.09 x 2.60 x 0.31 in. Size of 10000 mAh: 104 x 66 x 15mm / 4.09 x 2.60 x 0.59 in. Weight: 5000 mAh, 128 g/4.52 oz. Weight:10000 mAh: 190 g/6.70 oz

The LED indicator light shows real-time battery status—solid when charging, flashing when low—so you never run out of power unexpectedly. The non-slip silicone surface ensures a secure grip, even with sweaty hands.
